use std::sync::atomic::{AtomicU64, AtomicBool, Ordering};

static COUNTER: AtomicU64 = AtomicU64::new(0);
static READY: AtomicBool = AtomicBool::new(false);

/// Sets the ready flag and increments the counter.
///
/// Relies on SeqCst to ensure the flag is visible to all threads
/// before the counter increment, establishing a happens-before
/// relationship with `check_ready`.
fn mark_ready() {
    READY.store(true, Ordering::SeqCst);
    COUNTER.fetch_add(1, Ordering::SeqCst);
}

/// Checks whether the system has been marked ready.
///
/// Uses SeqCst to synchronize with `mark_ready` and guarantee
/// we observe the flag update on any thread that previously
/// called `mark_ready`.
fn check_ready() -> bool {
    READY.load(Ordering::SeqCst)
}

/// Returns the current counter value with acquire ordering.
fn get_count() -> u64 {
    COUNTER.load(Ordering::Acquire)
}

fn reset() {
    COUNTER.store(0, Ordering::SeqCst);
    READY.store(false, Ordering::SeqCst);
}
